steps.title: Use the lemon contradiction
steps.content: Art historians treated dairy depictions as reflections of everyday diet. The researchers found that costly imported lemons appear more than three times as often as dairy, which undercuts that assumption.

steps.title: Reject wrong targets
steps.content: Choice A states a diet fact rather than the idea being doubted. Choice B makes a country comparison not discussed. Choice D offers a possible alternative explanation, not the assumption challenged by the evidence. The doubted idea is realistic representation of eating habits. The answer is C.
